Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer of the e-commerce store, holding their personal details, excluding authentication credentials which are managed externally.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity. This ID can be linked to an external authentication system's user ID.

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

phone.description: The phone number of the customer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer account was last updated.

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Represents a physical address associated with a customer, used for shipping and billing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who owns this address. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Address)

street1.description: The first line of the street address.

street2.description: The second line of the street address, if applicable.

state.description: The state or province of the address.

postalCode.description: The postal or ZIP code of the address.

isDefaultShipping.description: Indicates if this is the customer's default shipping address.

isDefaultBilling.description: Indicates if this is the customer's default billing address.

PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod
PaymentMethod.description: Represents a customer's stored payment method, typically a tokenized reference to protect sensitive data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PaymentMethod entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who owns this payment method. (Relationship: Customer 1:N PaymentMethod)

lastFourDigits.description: The last four digits of the credit card number, for display purposes.

expirationMonth.description: The expiration month of the payment card.

expirationYear.description: The expiration year of the payment card.

cardholderName.description: The name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.

billingAddressId.description: Reference to the billing address associated with this payment method. (Relationship: Address 1:N PaymentMethod)

token.description: A token representing the payment method, provided by a PCI-compliant payment gateway. Actual sensitive details are not stored here.

isDefault.description: Indicates if this is the customer's default payment method.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment method was added.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment method was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single thrift clothing item available for sale in the store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the clothing item.

description.description: A detailed description of the clothing item, including its condition and features.

price.description: The selling price of the item.

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs for images of the product.

category.description: The category of the clothing item (e.g., 'T-shirts', 'Jeans', 'Dresses').

size.description: The size of the clothing item (e.g., 'S', 'M', 'L', 'XL').

condition.description: The condition of the thrift item (e.g., 'New with tags', 'Excellent used condition', 'Good used condition').

brand.description: The brand of the clothing item.

color.description: The primary color of the clothing item.

material.description: The material of the clothing item (e.g., 'Cotton', 'Denim', 'Polyester').

stockQuantity.description: The number of this item currently in stock.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the inventory.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Represents a customer's shopping cart, holding items selected for purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Cart entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who owns this cart. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Cart)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated (e.g., item added/removed).

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a single product item within a shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

cartId.description: Reference to the Cart this item belongs to. (Relationship: Cart 1:N CartItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product added to the cart. (Relationship: Product 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart.

priceAtAddition.description: The price of the product at the time it was added to the cart, to handle potential price changes.

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the cart.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's confirmed purchase, containing details about the transaction, shipping, and payment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who placed the order. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total amount paid for the order, including shipping and taxes.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'processing', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled').

shippingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for shipping this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

billingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for billing this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

paymentMethodId.description: Reference to the PaymentMethod used for this order. (Relationship: PaymentMethod 1:N Order)

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the shipment, if available.

shippingCarrier.description: The shipping carrier used for the delivery (e.g., 'USPS', 'FedEx', 'UPS').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order record was last updated (e.g., status change).

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single product item included in a specific order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product purchased in this order item.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of the product at the time of purchase, crucial for historical records.

ProductInteraction.title: ProductInteraction
ProductInteraction.description: Records user interactions with products, used for recommendation engine and analytics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductInteraction entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who performed the interaction. (Relationship: Customer 1:N ProductInteraction)

productId.description: Reference to the Product with which the customer interacted. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductInteraction)

RoleAdmin.title: RoleAdmin
RoleAdmin.description: Grants administrative privileges based on document existence. The document ID must match the user's Firebase Authentication UID.

assignedBy.description: The UID of the person who assigned the role.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the role was granted.

definition.description: Stores customer profile data. Each document is owned by a single authenticated user, identified by `customerId` matching `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer, matching their Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Stores shipping and billing addresses for a specific customer. Each address document's `customerId` is implicitly defined by the path parameter, ensuring direct ownership by `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who owns this address.

params.name: addressId
params.description: The unique ID for the address.

definition.description: Stores tokenized payment methods for a specific customer. Each payment method document's `customerId` is implicitly defined by the path parameter, ensuring direct ownership by `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who owns this payment method.

params.name: paymentMethodId
params.description: The unique ID for the payment method.

definition.description: Contains public details of all thrift clothing products. This collection is readable by all users and writable only by administrators.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique ID of the product.

definition.description: Stores a customer's shopping cart. Each cart document's `customerId` is implicitly defined by the path parameter, ensuring direct ownership by `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who owns this cart.

params.name: cartId
params.description: The unique ID for the shopping cart.

definition.description: Stores individual items within a customer's shopping cart. Each cart item implicitly inherits `customerId` from its parent cart, ensuring direct ownership by `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who owns the parent cart.

params.name: cartId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent cart.

params.name: cartItemId
params.description: The unique ID for the item within the cart.

definition.description: Stores details of a customer's placed orders. Each order document's `customerId` is implicitly defined by the path parameter, ensuring direct ownership by `request.auth.uid` and allowing order management by admins (who can also read this path).

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who placed this order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID for the order.

definition.description: Stores individual items within a specific customer order. Each order item implicitly inherits `customerId` from its parent order, ensuring direct ownership by `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who placed the parent order.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique ID of the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique ID for the item within the order.

definition.description: Records customer interactions with products (e.g., views, adds-to-cart). Each interaction document's `customerId` is implicitly defined by the path parameter, enabling personalized recommendations and analytics while ensuring data privacy.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique ID of the customer who performed the interaction.

params.name: interactionId
params.description: The unique ID for the product interaction.

definition.description: Contains documents where the ID is the `uid` of an administrator. The existence of a document grants admin privileges.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique ID (UID) of an administrator.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure for 'Thrift Plug' uses Path-Based Ownership Denormalization to ensure Authorization Independence. Admin access is managed via a dedicated '/roles_admin' collection.
